title: Listening - Part 2
description: For each question, choose the correct answer.
instructions: You will hear six short extracts. For questions 8–13, choose the answer (A, B or C) which fits best according to what you hear.

extracts.context: You will hear two friends talking about joining a gardening club.
extracts.audio_script: Woman: Are you still thinking of joining that gardening club near the park? || Man: Yes, but I wasn't sure. I looked at the website and the photos were nice, though the membership fee seemed a bit high. || Woman: My aunt goes there. She says the people are friendly and beginners get lots of help. || Man: That's good. [8]I mainly want someone to show me what to plant each month, so the advice is exactly what I need[/8]. I'll join this week.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Are you still thinking of joining that gardening club near the park?

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Yes, but I wasn't sure. I looked at the website and the photos were nice, though the membership fee seemed a bit high.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: My aunt goes there. She says the people are friendly and beginners get lots of help.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: That's good. I mainly want someone to show me what to plant each month, so the advice is exactly what I need. I'll join this week.

questions.question: The man wants to join the club because he

options.B: likes the pictures on the website.

questions.explanation: The man says he wants someone to show him what to plant each month, so he needs help from experienced gardeners.

extracts.context: You will hear a woman telling a friend about a cooking course.
extracts.audio_script: Man: How was your first cooking class? Was the teacher friendly? || Woman: Very, and the recipes weren't difficult. We made soup and bread, which was fun. The only problem was the kitchen. || Man: Was it badly equipped? || Woman: No, everything was there, but [9]there were sixteen of us around one table, so I could hardly see what the teacher was doing[/9]. I learned less than I hoped. || Man: I see what you mean. Sometimes those small details matter more than people expect at first.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: How was your first cooking class? Was the teacher friendly?

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Very, and the recipes weren't difficult. We made soup and bread, which was fun. The only problem was the kitchen.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Was it badly equipped?

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: No, everything was there, but there were sixteen of us around one table, so I could hardly see what the teacher was doing. I learned less than I hoped.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: I see what you mean. Sometimes those small details matter more than people expect at first.

questions.question: What did the woman dislike about the course?
questions.explanation: She says there were sixteen people around one table, so she could hardly see the teacher.

extracts.context: You will hear two colleagues talking about a new office printer.
extracts.audio_script: Woman: Have you tried the new printer yet? It's supposed to be faster. || Man: I used it this morning. The pages came out quickly, and the print quality was fine. I thought it would be difficult to connect my computer, but that was easy. || Woman: So you're happy with it? || Man: Not completely. [10]It makes a loud noise every time it starts, and people near my desk keep looking round[/10]. I hope they move it somewhere else.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Have you tried the new printer yet? It's supposed to be faster.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: I used it this morning. The pages came out quickly, and the print quality was fine. I thought it would be difficult to connect my computer, but that was easy.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: So you're happy with it?

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Not completely. It makes a loud noise every time it starts, and people near my desk keep looking round. I hope they move it somewhere else.

questions.question: What problem does the man have with the printer?

options.A: It is slow to print documents.
options.B: It is hard to connect to computers.
options.C: It is too noisy for the office.

questions.explanation: The man says the printer makes a loud noise every time it starts.

extracts.context: You will hear a woman talking to a friend about a book she has read.
extracts.audio_script: Man: Did you finish that travel book I lent you? || Woman: Yes. I expected it to be full of exciting adventures, but it was quieter than that. || Man: Oh, so you didn't enjoy it? || Woman: I did, actually. [11]The writer describes ordinary places so clearly that I felt I was walking beside her[/11]. The photos weren't very special, but the writing was lovely. || Man: Anyway, let me know what happens, because I'm interested to hear how it goes next time.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Did you finish that travel book I lent you?

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Yes. I expected it to be full of exciting adventures, but it was quieter than that.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Oh, so you didn't enjoy it?

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: I did, actually. The writer describes ordinary places so clearly that I felt I was walking beside her. The photos weren't very special, but the writing was lovely.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Anyway, let me know what happens, because I'm interested to hear how it goes next time.

questions.question: What did the woman like about the book?

options.A: the way the places were described

questions.explanation: She says the writer describes ordinary places so clearly that she felt she was there.

extracts.context: You will hear two friends talking about a swimming pool.
extracts.audio_script: Woman: Have you been to the new swimming pool yet? || Man: Yes, I went yesterday. The changing rooms are clean, and the café looked nice, although I didn't try it. || Woman: Is the pool good for serious swimming? || Man: It is, but [12]you need to book early because the evening sessions are full almost every day[/12]. I wanted seven o'clock but had to take nine. || Woman: Yes, and at least you can plan better now, which should make things less stressful.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Have you been to the new swimming pool yet?

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Yes, I went yesterday. The changing rooms are clean, and the café looked nice, although I didn't try it.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Is the pool good for serious swimming?

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: It is, but you need to book early because the evening sessions are full almost every day. I wanted seven o'clock but had to take nine.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Yes, and at least you can plan better now, which should make things less stressful.

questions.question: What does the man say about the swimming pool?

options.A: The changing rooms are not clean enough.
options.B: It is difficult to get a place in the evening.
options.C: The café is better than he expected.

questions.explanation: He says the evening sessions are full almost every day, so booking a place then is difficult.

extracts.context: You will hear a woman leaving a voicemail about a lost bag.
extracts.audio_script: Speaker: Hi, it's Maria. I'm calling about the bag I left at your house yesterday. I thought it might be in the kitchen because we had coffee there, but I've checked my photos and I can see it beside the sofa. [13]Could you look in the living room, near the small table, and let me know if it's still there[/13]? I don't need it today, but there are some keys inside.

dialogue.speaker: speaker
dialogue.text: Hi, it's Maria. I'm calling about the bag I left at your house yesterday. I thought it might be in the kitchen because we had coffee there, but I've checked my photos and I can see it beside the sofa. Could you look in the living room, near the small table, and let me know if it's still there? I don't need it today, but there are some keys inside.

questions.question: Where does Maria think her bag is?
questions.explanation: Maria asks her friend to look in the living room near the small table.
